finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_03.md:33 (sensory rendering 'cold enough to make him feel his own face' replaces 'the specific way'), chapters/chapter_03.md:47 ('the pull behind his sternum' replaces 'the specific pang'), chapters/chapter_03.md:63 ('each one locked into the same blank commuter expression' replaces double-hit 'the particular expression' and 'the specific blankness'), chapters/chapter_03.md:79 ('the specific beige' retained — sole remaining instance), chapters/chapter_03.md:243 ('his jaw loosening, his brows lifting a fraction, the whole face softening' replaces 'the specific arrangement'), chapters/chapter_03.md:345 ('his mouth slightly open, his face slack and unhurried' replaces 'the particular peace')
finding_results.notes: Reduced from 7 instances to 1. Retained only line 79 ('the specific beige of a space designed to communicate') — it earns its definitional frame because the institutional setting makes the naming feel like bureaucratic contagion. All 5 other locations now use direct sensory rendering, concrete physical detail, or active-verb constructions. 5 of 6 cited locations revised (exceeds the 4-minimum acceptance threshold).

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_03.md:289 (Mira's 'Shit' at the composure-crack point, preceded by angular voice and mid-sentence break), chapters/chapter_03.md:337 (Dan's 'The fucking refrigerator' embedded in the absurdity speech, breaking composed surface)
finding_results.notes: Two instances of profanity added to the sidewalk argument at peak-pressure moments. Mira's 'Shit' is pressurized and event-like — it replaces the falter ('She stopped' instead of 'She faltered'), making the profanity itself the composure crack, consistent with her style-bible profile ('selective but explosive'). Dan's 'fucking' is common and embedded in speech without emphasis, consistent with his profile ('common and unimaginative'), breaking the wry/composed surface of his articulate speech to signal genuine distress beneath the ironic acceptance Mira has been reading as capitulation.

summary: Both findings addressed. ch03_f01 (HIGH): Reduced 'the specific/particular [noun] of' pattern from 7 instances to 1, retaining only the strongest use at line 79. Five replacement constructions use direct sensory rendering (line 33: cold's physical effect on face), embodied sensation (line 47: pull behind sternum), concrete visual detail (line 63: commuter faces rendered directly; line 243: jaw, brows, facial softening), and physical description (line 345: mouth open, face slack). ch03_f04 (MEDIUM): Added 2 instances of character-appropriate profanity to the sidewalk scene — Mira's compressed 'Shit' at the sentence-break point (line 289) and Dan's embedded 'fucking' in the refrigerator speech (line 337) — both placed at moments of peak pressure with preceding physical/vocal tells, consistent with style-bible profanity profiles.
